title: horminum frutescens
intro: Horminum frutescens, also known as mountain mint, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe, known for its distinctive square-shaped stems and fragrant leaves. Traditionally, mountain mint has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been utilized to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Horminum frutescens include its ability to ease symptoms of indigestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Mountain mint can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
